title: Define TDMA time slots, frequency agility, rendezvous in CCP-1 scope
description: Write the coordinated capacity section for spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md covering TDMA slot definition (slot duration, guard times, synchronization), channel agility (hopping sequences, control vs data channels), and rendezvous mechanisms (beacon-based, hash-based slot/channel selection). Include diagrams, tables for parameters, compatibility notes. Update TOC in spec/README.md if needed. Follow IETF spec style. After writing, run codereview process 3 times.
close_reason: Completed CCP-1 scope definition in spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md after 3 clean codereview passes. Child beads filed and resolved. Spec includes TDMA slots (250ms w/ 50ms guard), channel agility, hash/scheduled rendezvous, TOC update.
